query: SELECT id, locationId, companyId, LENGTH(accessToken) as access_token_len, LENGTH(refreshToken) as refresh_token_len, expiresAt, scopes, lastRefreshedAt, lastError, createdAt, updatedAt FROM ghl_oauth_tokens;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, locationId, companyId, LENGTH(accessToken) as access_token_len, LENGTH(refreshToken) as refresh_token_len, expiresAt, scopes, lastRefreshedAt, lastError, createdAt, updatedAt FROM ghl_oauth_tokens;

rows.scopes: contacts.readonly contacts.write conversations.readonly conversations/message.readonly conversations/message.write opportunities.readonly opportunities.write users.readonly calendars.readonly calendars/events.readonly calendars/events.write workflows.readonly locations.readonly
